subject: Weekly digest: milestone track in Canberra | Frida Kahlo | Q2 review | INIT-5821
body: Please note the milestone stream in Canberra has shifted to a tighter timeline. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Document sightings of kangaroos and koalas near transport hubs, rooftops, and civic precincts. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Background context draws on methods associated with Frida Kahlo. Reference initiative INIT-5821. We will consolidate updates in the next steering sync. Tracking tags: marsupials, drop-bears.
